privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task operates on a synthetically generated Sentrifugo database initialized via setup scripts. The expected target reporting managers (EMP003 for EMP007, EMP015 for EMP009, EMP005 for EMP011, EMP008 for EMP014), target departments (Engineering for EMP010, Data Science for EMP016), and new target job title (Team Lead for EMP017) perfectly match the instructions embedded in the restructuring memo text within setup_task.sh and the explicit scoring logic in verifier.py. Notably, the names associated with the employee IDs in the memo are entirely fabricated and contradict the actual employee names assigned in the database seed data, meaning an agent must rely strictly on the employee IDs to identify the correct records.
